review_basis: Each target_zoom was inspected individually; full_context was additionally inspected for ambiguous or initially unclear records.

decisions.review_note: The annotation is on an abdominal/navel region in a secondary panel, not the canonical anus target.
A coarse square covers the target and substantial neighboring pixels.
The mask is a coarse region rather than an exact target boundary.
A rectangular mask includes substantial neighboring perineal anatomy.
An elliptical region materially exceeds the visible target boundary.
The mask follows a broad neighboring genital region rather than the canonical anus target.
A coarse square does not follow the visible target boundary.
The mask is aligned to neighboring external genital anatomy, not an exact anus target.
The rectangle is much larger than the visible target.
A large circular region includes neighboring anatomy.
The polygon follows a neighboring genital/perineal region rather than an exact anus target.

The rectangle covers a long intergluteal region rather than the exact target.

The mask is on the navel, not the anus.

The mask follows a neighboring perineal/genital boundary, not an exact anus target.
